title: Verticalized empty states, campaigns
summary: Does a vertical-specific empty state increase campaign creation?
hypothesis: We believe that replacing the current Campaigns empty state with a verticalized empty state for all signups will improve 7-day activation because showing industry-relevant copy and imagery at a high-visibility early-product surface should make Klaviyo feel more relevant to the customer's business without changing the underlying campaign-creation workflows. We will measure success using Activation 7D, and monitor campaign creation for regressions in the existing empty-state funnel to ensure no negative impact.
notes: PRD linked in Slack thread. Part of a broader initiative to make the platform less e-commerce centric; a flows version is planned next. A design screenshot was attached in the Slack thread (not embedded here, requires auth). No matching entry found in the Adoption Experiment Tracker FY26 or K60 Growth Project Plan.
treatment_description: Verticalized campaigns empty state with industry-specific banner
